clips.title: The Harvest
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, natural light. Golden hour. A vast wheat field with rolling golden crops, a lone tree, distant hills. A person in a worn work shirt stands among the wheat looking to the horizon. The crane camera rises up and back to reveal the immense field stretching to the sunset. Drifting chaff, long shadows, a far-off barn. Warm golden light. Crane boom up, sweeping reveal. Epic cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Rooftop Dawn
clips.prompt: Anime style, bold clean linework, cel shading, vibrant color, expressive. Dawn. A person in a school-style uniform stands on a rooftop railing looking over a waking anime city. The crane camera rises up and over them to reveal the sprawling skyline and pink sunrise sky. Fluttering birds, laundry lines, distant trains. Soft warm dawn light. Crane boom up, sweeping reveal. Uplifting anime aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Cathedral
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, dramatic light. A vast gothic cathedral interior, towering stone columns, stained-glass windows, candlelit aisle. A person in a long coat stands small at the center of the nave, looking up. The crane camera rises to reveal the soaring vaulted ceiling far above. Dust motes in light shafts, flickering candles, carved arches. Cool light with warm candle glow. Crane boom up, awe-struck reveal. Majestic cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Neon Overlook
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk style, high-contrast neon, rain-slicked reflections, dense futuristic detail. Night. A person in a techwear jacket stands on a wet balcony overlooking a future megacity. The crane camera rises up and back to reveal a canyon of neon towers, flying traffic, and holographic ads below. Drifting rain, steam, distant airships. Saturated neon against dark. Crane boom up, dizzying reveal. Sprawling cyberpunk aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Stadium
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, stadium light. Night. A person in a team jersey stands alone on a floodlit pitch, arms raised. The crane camera rises up and back to reveal a packed roaring stadium of thousands, camera flashes rippling the stands. Confetti in the air, banners, bright floodlights. Crisp stadium light. Crane boom up, triumphant reveal. Euphoric cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Watercolor Harbor
clips.prompt: Soft watercolor painting style, translucent washes, bleeding colors, paper texture, loose edges. Morning. A person in a light jacket stands on a stone pier by a quiet harbor. The crane camera rises to reveal moored fishing boats, gulls, and a pastel seaside town beyond. Gentle ripples, soft reflections, drifting clouds. Soft cool morning light. Crane boom up, gentle reveal. Serene watercolor aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Throne Room
clips.prompt: Epic fantasy style, painterly cinematic realism, rich color, dramatic light. A grand fantasy throne hall, colossal carved pillars, banners, shafts of colored light. A person in ornate armor stands before a distant throne. The crane camera rises to reveal the immense scale of the hall and a vaulted ceiling of gold. Drifting embers, kneeling figures, glowing braziers. Warm regal light. Crane boom up, grand reveal. Majestic fantasy aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Launch Pad
clips.prompt: Cinematic sci-fi realism, photoreal, sleek production design, atmospheric light. Dawn. A person in a flight suit stands on a gantry beside a towering rocket venting vapor. The crane camera rises alongside the rocket to reveal its full height and the launch complex below. Billowing steam, floodlights, distant control towers. Cool dawn light with warm floods. Crane boom up, towering reveal. Awe-inspiring sci-fi aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Market Square
clips.prompt: Hyperrealistic style, ultra-sharp detail, lifelike textures, natural light, photographic depth. Day. A person in linen clothes stands in a bustling old market square. The crane camera rises to reveal the full square packed with stalls, awnings, and crowds, ringed by ancient buildings. Fluttering pigeons, colorful canopies, a central fountain. Warm daylight. Crane boom up, bustling reveal. Vivid hyperrealistic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Snowfield
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, natural light. Day. A person in a heavy parka stands alone in a vast snowfield, breath fogging. The crane camera rises up and back to reveal an endless white expanse ringed by distant frozen peaks. Blowing snow, a lone trail of footprints, pale sun. Cold bright light. Crane boom up, lonely reveal. Stark cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Workshop
clips.prompt: Stop-motion claymation style, molded clay figures, fingerprint texture, handmade plasticine, tactile. Day. A clay person stands in the middle of a cozy clay workshop full of tiny tools and contraptions. The crane camera rises to reveal the whole cluttered workshop from above, shelves and gadgets everywhere. Clay dust, a clay cat, little clay lamps. Warm soft light. Crane boom up, charming reveal. Whimsical claymation aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Concert Rise
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, concert light. Night. A person in stage clothes stands at the front of a stage, arm raised. The crane camera rises up and back to reveal a massive crowd filling a dark arena, a sea of phone lights and lasers. Haze, confetti, blinding stage beams. Vivid stage light against dark. Crane boom up, electric reveal. Euphoric cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Painted Valley
clips.prompt: Digital painting style, painterly, visible brushstrokes, rich blended color, concept-art illustration. Day. A person in a traveler's cloak stands on a ridge overlooking a valley. The crane camera rises to reveal a sweeping painted valley of forests, a winding river, and far mountains. Drifting clouds, birds, sun rays through mist. Warm painterly light. Crane boom up, sweeping reveal. Epic painted aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Library
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, warm light. A person in smart-casual clothes stands among towering bookshelves in a grand old library. The crane camera rises to reveal multiple soaring balconies of books and a domed skylight above. Rolling ladders, floating dust, warm reading lamps. Warm amber light. Crane boom up, wondrous reveal. Elegant cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Pixel Kingdom
clips.prompt: Retro pixel art style, blocky pixels, limited palette, 16-bit game aesthetic, crisp pixel edges. Day. A pixel-art person stands at the gates of a small pixel town. The crane camera rises to reveal the whole pixel kingdom: rooftops, a castle, fields, and a pixel river. Pixel clouds, tiny NPCs, waving flags. Bright cheerful light. Crane boom up, world reveal. Nostalgic pixel-art aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Trench
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, desaturated filmic grade, overcast light. A person in period military coat stands in a muddy trench. The crane camera rises up and out of the trench to reveal a vast bleak battlefield of trenches and mist stretching to the horizon. Barbed wire, drifting smoke, distant flares. Cold overcast light. Crane boom up, sobering reveal. Somber cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Ballroom
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, warm chandelier light. Night. A person in elegant formalwear stands at the edge of a grand ballroom. The crane camera rises to reveal a swirl of dancers below and a ceiling of glittering chandeliers. Twirling gowns, gold trim, marble floor. Warm golden light. Crane boom up, opulent reveal. Lavish cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Comic Skyline
clips.prompt: Comic book style, bold ink outlines, halftone shading, dynamic saturated color, action energy. Day. A person in a heroic caped outfit stands on a rooftop ledge. The crane camera rises up and back to reveal a dramatic comic-book city skyline of skyscrapers and swooping motion lines. Speed lines, a bright sun-burst, tiny cars below. Bold dramatic light. Crane boom up, heroic reveal. Explosive comic-book aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Vineyard
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, golden light. Late afternoon. A person in casual linen stands among rows of grapevines. The crane camera rises up and back to reveal endless rolling vineyard rows and a hilltop villa. Warm haze, drifting insects, long shadows. Golden warm light. Crane boom up, idyllic reveal. Lush cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Ghibli Hilltop
clips.prompt: Soft hand-painted animation style, lush painterly backgrounds, gentle colors, whimsical and warm. Day. A person in a simple dress stands on a grassy hilltop with a lone tree. The crane camera rises to reveal a patchwork countryside of fields, a winding road, and a distant town under a big cloud-filled sky. Swaying grass, drifting seeds, soaring birds. Warm gentle light. Crane boom up, dreamy reveal. Whimsical hand-painted aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Docks
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, cool light. Dusk. A person in a work jacket stands on a shipping dock among stacked containers. The crane camera rises to reveal an immense port of cranes, cargo ships, and endless containers under a fading sky. Gulls, distant horns, drifting mist. Cool blue dusk with sodium lamps. Crane boom up, industrial reveal. Moody cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: 3D Arena
clips.prompt: Polished 3D CGI animation style, smooth rendered surfaces, soft global illumination, subtle depth of field. A stylized 3D person stands at the center of a futuristic arena floor. The crane camera rises to reveal tiered glowing stands and a domed roof of light. Floating drones, glowing rings, a cheering rendered crowd. Cool blue with warm accents. Crane boom up, grand reveal. Polished 3D CGI aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Desert Ruins
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, harsh light. Day. A person in desert traveler's garb stands before a half-buried ancient statue. The crane camera rises to reveal a sprawling desert ruin of toppled columns and dunes to the horizon. Blowing sand, heat shimmer, a distant caravan. Harsh warm light. Crane boom up, epic reveal. Grand cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Sketch Plaza
clips.prompt: Pencil sketch style, graphite drawing, hand-drawn linework, cross-hatching, loose gestural lines, mostly monochrome. Day. A sketched person stands in the middle of a European plaza. The crane camera rises to reveal the whole hatched plaza with a fountain, cafes, and surrounding buildings. Sketched pigeons, market stalls, loose scribbled crowds. Soft graphite shading. Crane boom up, gestural reveal. Elegant pencil-sketch aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Rice Terraces
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, natural light. Morning. A person in a straw hat and work clothes stands on a narrow path among flooded rice terraces. The crane camera rises to reveal cascading emerald terraces stepping down a misty mountainside. Reflections in the water, drifting mist, distant huts. Soft morning light. Crane boom up, serene reveal. Lush cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Cartoon Fair
clips.prompt: Cartoon style, bold outlines, bright flat colors, squash-and-stretch, playful. Day. A cartoon person stands at the entrance of a wacky fairground. The crane camera rises to reveal a whole zany carnival of a bouncing ferris wheel, striped tents, and bopping crowds. Floating balloons, popcorn, a wobbling roller coaster. Bright cheerful light. Crane boom up, joyful reveal. Zany cartoon aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Newsroom Floor
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, cool light. Day. A person in business attire stands at a desk in a newsroom. The crane camera rises to reveal a huge open floor of desks, glowing screens, and a giant news wall. Rushing staff, ringing phones, ticker displays. Cool office light. Crane boom up, bustling reveal. clips.title: Noir Rooftop
clips.prompt: Film noir style, high-contrast black and white, deep shadows, moody. Night. A person in a trench coat and hat stands at a rooftop edge. The crane camera rises up and back to reveal a shadowy black-and-white city of smoking chimneys and glinting wet streets far below. Searchlight beams, a full moon, drifting fog. Hard chiaroscuro light. Crane boom up, brooding reveal. Classic noir aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Waterfall
clips.prompt: Cinematic live-action realism, photoreal, filmic color grade, natural light. Day. A person in hiking gear stands on a rock at the base of a jungle pool. The crane camera rises to reveal a towering waterfall thundering down a lush green cliff far above. Mist rainbows, spray, hanging vines. Bright natural light. Crane boom up, majestic reveal. Lush cinematic aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Spaceport
clips.prompt: Cinematic sci-fi realism, photoreal, sleek production design, atmospheric light. Dusk. A person in a flight jacket stands on a landing platform beside a sleek shuttle. The crane camera rises to reveal a vast futuristic spaceport of docked ships, glowing towers, and departing craft against a purple sky. Hovering traffic, vapor trails, distant skyline. Cool dusk with warm glows. Crane boom up, expansive reveal. Epic sci-fi aesthetic, 24fps.
